summary: Exposed smart_core runtime provider hooks at smart_construction_core addon root, but acceptance still fails due existing project view validation blocker preventing smart_construction_core upgrade and schema materialization.

blocker.detail: project_views.xml validation error: company_id missing in form for post_id domain; blocks core upgrade and leaves new project fields not materialized

next_step: Create dedicated recovery task to fix project_views.xml validation, re-run smart_construction_core upgrade, then re-run native business-fact stage gate
